message:
chore(beads): close ok47 (Tower adapter) and 8jx5 (io_uring reactor)

Verified and closed two more stale in_progress beads:

- asupersync-ok47: Tower adapter fully implemented with TowerAdapter,
  CxProvider, bidirectional conversion, tests. Unblocked asupersync-yn7e.
- asupersync-8jx5: io_uring reactor fully implemented with 25+ integration
  tests, feature-gated for Linux, graceful fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
